prompt: Create a Confluence page in TEAM space titled 'API Integration Guide' with headings, bullet lists, an ordered list, and a Python code block showing a sample API call.
assertions: Code blocks are converted to <ac:structured-macro ac:name="code"> Confluence macros
Headings are converted to <h1>-<h6> HTML tags
Bullet lists are converted to <ul><li> HTML
Ordered lists are converted to <ol><li> HTML
marked library handles the conversion (toStorageFormat uses marked, not custom parser)
